chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No. D-487 of 2025 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.06.2025. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Brohi, advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P.G. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Asst. A.G., along with IO/ASI Qadir Bux Joyo of PS Warisdino Machhi. Respondent No.6 Sultan present in person. --------------------- Petitioners Mst. Tehmina and Mashooque Ali have filed instant petition, asserting that the petitioner No.1 Mst. Tehmina being sui juris has contracted free-will marriage with petitioner No.2 Mashooque Ali Khoso on 13.05.2025, on which her father Sultan Khoso, the respondent No.6, having become annoyed has lodged FIR No.07/2025 at PS Warisdino Machhi, District Larkana, for offence u/s 457, 496-A, 365-B, 34, PPC against the petitioner No.2 and his family members and now the respondents No.1 & 2 and their subordinates at the behest of private respondent No.6 and under the garb of said FIR are causing harassment to the petitioners; besides, the petitioners apprehend danger to their lives at the hands of relatives of petitioner No.1 including the respondent No.6. Statements have been filed by and on behalf of respondents No.1, 2, 3 & 4, which are taken on record; copies whereof are provided to learned Counsel for the petitioners. Mr. Nooruddin Mahessar advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6 and submits that the petitioner No.1 was already married with her relative and she is pregnant of 5/6 months out of such wedlock. However, on query he is unable to produce any proof/evidence of such marriage.

Nooruddin Mahessar advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6 and submits that the petitioner No.1 was already married with her relative and she is pregnant of 5/6 months out of such wedlock. However, on query he is unable to produce any proof/evidence of such marriage. Today, the IO ASI Qadir Bux has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Tehmina and has placed its copy on record; wherein Mst.Rehmina has stated that she left the house of her parents and contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 Mashooque Ali on 13.05.2025 out of her free-will and consent and that she has not been abducted, enticed or coerced by any one including the petitioner No.2. The IO of Crime No.07/2025 of PS Warisdino Machhi present submits that he will file report u/s 173, Cr.P.C. before the concerned Court/Magistrate seeking disposal of the aforementioned FIR in the light of statement of petitioner No.1. In view of above, learned Counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the petition, which is disposed of accordingly. However, the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE
